meta.session: lint + fix sprint через yarn headroom:claude
meta.note: Реальная Claude Code сессия через headroom proxy. Включает 10 синтетических вызовов (2026-06-29) + ~95 реальных (2026-07-01).

findings.why_low_compression: Claude Code messages dominated by structured tool call JSON and file diffs — content_router threshold (50 words prose) rarely triggered. 105 requests, 8349 tokens saved by content_router (0.1%).
findings.unexpected_positive: cache_hit_pct=98.2% — prompt cache extremely effective. 7.9M cache_read_tokens vs 143k cache_write_tokens. Real cost savings come from Anthropic's prompt cache, not headroom compression.

m2_gate_status.target: >=40% token savings on 2/3 of real Claude Code session outputs
m2_gate_status.recommendation: Headroom content_router не даёт значимой компрессии для Claude Code workload. Prompt cache (98.2% hit) — реальный механизм экономии. Рассмотреть переопределение M2 gate под cache_hit_pct вместо content compression.
